content.text:
From grepping the source, here are all distinct event types written to `cluster_events` (via `logClusterEvent` calls with `eventType:`):

| Event type | Files |
|---|---|
| `archive` | `src/db.ts` |
| `bare_probe_failed` | `src/runtime.ts` |
| `broad_cwd_warning` | `src/runtime.ts` |
| `cluster_consult` | `src/clusterConsult.ts` |
| `cluster_consult_failed` | `src/clusterConsult.ts` |
| `cluster_created` | `src/db.ts` |
| `cluster_fallback_failed` | `src/tools.ts` |
| `cluster_fallback_to_claude_consult` | `src/tools.ts` |
| `cluster_refresh` | `src/clusterRefresh.ts` |
| `cluster_refresh_required` | `src/clusterConsult.ts` |
| `cost_limit_exceeded` | `src/consult.ts` |
| `degraded_mode_entered` | `src/consult.ts`, `src/runtime.ts` |
| `dormant` | `src/db.ts` |
| `evidence_revalidation_failed` | `src/clusterEvidenceRevalidation.ts` |
| `evidence_revalidated` | `src/clusterEvidenceRevalidation.ts` |
| `factsheet_rejected` | `src/cluster.ts` |
| `factsheet_stale` | `src/clusterRefresh.ts` |
| `health_check_failed` | `src/consult.ts` |
| `health_probe_failed` | `src/runtime.ts` |
| `health_probe_passed` | `src/runtime.ts` |
| `llm_verifier` | `src/cluster.ts` |
